response.justification: Bogdan significantly exceeds the minimum 15-year experience requirement with approximately 20 years of proven software engineering excellence and a strong entrepreneurial track record (GISCollective founder, 9+ years). However, this role specifically targets AI Strategy expertise, and his background lacks demonstrated mastery of AI/ML products or platforms. While his current position at re:cinq mentions AI-agent infrastructure, this is too recent (April 2025) to establish the 'recognized expertise in AI' that the preferred qualifications emphasize. He is an exceptional general software engineer and leader, but not yet positioned as an AI strategy specialist.
strengths: 20+ years of software engineering experience exceeds minimum by one-third, spanning full-stack, infrastructure, embedded systems, and multiple domains
Proven entrepreneurial execution as GISCollective founder (9+ years active), demonstrating ability to build and maintain technical vision
Strong communication and mentoring capabilities shown through workshops, teaching, Code Kata organization, and cross-domain technical leadership
concerns: No Master's or PhD in AI/ML; first AI-focused role began only recently (April 2025) with no demonstrated shipped AI/ML products or platforms
Lacks recognized thought leadership or published expertise in artificial intelligence or machine learning domains
Limited cloud AI platform experience; AWS CDK and general cloud work present, but no evidence of cloud AI services (SageMaker, Vertex AI) or AI platform architecture

key_factors.factor: Recent AI Infrastructure Work & Entrepreneurial Track Record
